name: Bayrischer Kartoffelsalat (Barvarian Potato Salad)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice the potatoes to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
2. Use either homemade or commercial chicken broth for cooking the potatoes.
3. Bring the potatoes in the broth with 1/4 teaspoon salt to a boil, then cook for 5 to 8 minutes until tender.
4. Drain the potatoes and toss them with vegetable oil and chopped onions.
5. Dissolve the remaining 1/4 teaspoon of salt and sugar in lemon juice.
6. Pour the mixture over the potatoes.
7. Allow the salad to marinate for 1 to 2 hours before serving at room temperature.
